name: claude-plugin-for-codex
description: Delegate work from Codex CLI to Claude Code

commands.name: claude-ask
commands.description: Delegate a read-only task or question to Claude Code.

commands.name: claude-review
commands.description: Have Claude review the current git diff.

commands.name: claude-status
commands.description: List active and recent Claude delegation jobs.

commands.name: claude-result
commands.description: Fetch the stored output of a finished job.

commands.name: claude-cancel
commands.description: Cancel a running Claude delegation job.

commands.name: claude-setup
commands.description: Diagnose installation and Claude CLI auth.
